name: accessibility-preflight
description: iOS-first accessibility preflight for Apple app teams.

interface.longDescription: Run static checks, runtime verification, review-gated remediation, and explicit manual assistive-tech workflows for Apple-native apps before release.
defaultPrompt: Run accessibility preflight on this Apple app.
Use the iOS lane by default unless the project is clearly macOS-only.
Treat generated remediation as review-gated and call out the manual assistive-tech workflow before claiming release confidence.
